name: raptor
description: Agent orchestrator with specialist skills for coding workflows, code review, planning, refactoring, and agent-flow design.

interface.shortDescription: Route coding work through specialist skills and build agent flows.
interface.longDescription: Raptor provides an orchestration skill, coding workflow skills, review and planning specialists, and an agent-flow builder for custom automations.
defaultPrompt: Route this coding task through the right skill.
Build a Raptor agent flow for this project.
Review this change and find runtime risks.
